title: Marine Larval Dispersal — Graphical User Interface (marine-larval-dispersal-gui)
description: Browser-based graphical interface for the Marine Larval Dispersal simulation pipeline. Provides a FastAPI backend connecting an HTML/JS frontend to OceanParcels 3.0.2 simulations forced by CMEMS Mediterranean ocean reanalysis. Features WoRMS species search API integration, CMEMS download wizard, multi-platform installers (macOS/Linux/Windows), real-time simulation progress, and publication-quality figure export. Companion to: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19955061
notes: Requires companion repository for simulation scripts: https://github.com/CyberTechSea/marine-larval-dispersal (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19955061). CMEMS forcing data available at https://marine.copernicus.eu (free registration). See README for installation and usage instructions.
